series_metadata.series_title: Complaints to the Cemetery Dispute Commission - Public Records
series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule pertains to records received by the Division regarding a complaint against a registered cemetery that is a matter of public record. This retention schedule includes, but is not limited to, the complaint, documents received with the complaint, any notice of hearing, any proof of service, exhibits submitted to the Commission for its review, any correspondence related to the complaint or any writing issued by the Commission.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Paper records are retained disciplinary file is closed at administrative level - date of Division''s final notice or date of Commission Order, whichever is later. recycled. ; Microform: Any images on microform are be maintained five years disciplinary file is closed at administrative level - date of Division''s final notice or date of Commission Order, whichever is later. , microform is destroyed. ; Electronic: Any images in machine readable format are be maintained five years disciplinary file is closed at administrative level - date of Division''s final notice or date of Commission Order, whichever is later. , machine readable format is destroyed
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Recycle ; Microform: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
